title: malvastrum aurantiacum
intro: Malvastrum aurantiacum, also known as the Orange Mallow, is a flowering plant species native to tropical America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Malvastrum aurantiacum include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and treat respiratory problems such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for its medicinal uses.
